description: QBR with Priya Sharma — four distinct product feedback items clearly stated by a Talent Leader

input.title: Eddie / Priya Sharma - Quarterly Business Review: Assessment Platform
input.markdownContent:
### What's Working

- Candidate completion rates improved after we switched to adaptive format
- Hiring managers trust the shortlist more than they did with CV screening alone

### Feedback

- The job family mapping is still too manual — Priya's team spends two hours per role configuring which dimensions to weight, and it doesn't carry over when they clone a similar role
- Candidates are dropping off at the video question stage — completion drops from 85% to 61% at that point
- Report language is too technical for hiring managers who don't have an HR background — they see "norm group percentile" and disengage
- No way to bulk-download candidate reports for a hiring panel — they have to open each one individually
participants: Priya Sharma (client, Head of TA, financial services)
